commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an OpenRouter stream wrapper that forwards resolved API keys as explicit Authorization plus OpenRouter attribution headers on verified OpenRouter routes, with OpenRouter and generic OpenAI-compatible auth tests.

PR surface: Source +39, Tests +98. Total +137 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: no. live before-fix reproduction was run in this read-only pass. The linked issue gives concrete latest-release steps, current main lacks an OpenRouter explicit-header wrapper, and the PR body shows a redacted after-fix live OpenRouter probe returning ok.
